name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use English Tutor:

Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

💬 Free Chat — Practice conversation with AI feedback
📝 Guided Exercise — Targeted practice on specific skills
📊 View Progress — See your streaks and saved corrections
🔔 Daily Reminder — Get a daily nudge to practice

Everything is button-driven — just tap to get started!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
